IMF expects Japan's economy to expand 1.1% in 2025 as rising real wages boost consumption.
Effective Fed Funds Rate 4.83% Oct. 21st vs 4.83% Oct. 18th.
Instructure released Lifelong Learning Report, highlighting collaboration's importance in bridging academic and workforce skills.
news.summary: Partnerships between the education sector and industry have been identified as crucial for preparing students for the future, by connecting theoretical learning with practical job skills. The announcement was made in Salt Lake City on October 22, 2024. Instructure, known for their Canvas LMS platform, is spearheading this initiative to address the growing importance of this collaboration. This move signifies a shift towards (specific numbers) ensuring students are equipped with the necessary tools and competencies demanded by the workforce.

news.headline: Mark Cuban questions Polymarket's election odds due to foreign influence, joining others in critiquing platform's predictions.
news.summary: In recent weeks, doubts about the accuracy of the predictions made by the crypto betting platform have been raised by more than just the billionaire.

news.headline: Exovera updates exoINSIGHT with Indo-Pacific data and AI capabilities. To be showcased at 2024 AFCEA TechNet Indo-Pacific.
news.summary: In Vienna, Va., Exovera unveiled the latest version of its analytical tool, exoINSIGHT, which now features an updated data repository focused on the Indo-Pacific region. The new release boasts advanced AI functions that can correlate and provide context to open-source data, augmenting analysts' comprehension of source materials. To demonstrate these enhancements, Exovera will exhibit at booth #1506 during the 2024 AFCEA TechNet Indo-Pacific event from October 22-24. exoINSIGHT, built on machine learning technology, serves as a comprehensive analytical platform.

news.headline: Gabelli Utility Trust raises $58 million with 11,624,109 common shares issued.
news.summary: In Rye, New York, on October 22, 2024, The Gabelli Utility Trust (NYSE: GUT) shared that its transferable rights offering was successfully concluded. The Offering resulted in the issuance of 11,624,109 common shares by the Fund. This move generated gross proceeds amounting to $58,120,545 for the Fund, incorporating over-subscription requests and notices of guaranteed delivery.

news.headline: L.L.Bean partners with Noah Kahan for limited-edition collection inspired by Vermont home. Launches on Oct. 22, 2024.
news.summary: Outdoor retailer L.L.Bean revealed a new limited-edition collection on Oct. 22, 2024. Inspired by Kahan's Vermont home, the collection includes footwear, apparel, and accessories. The collection is available in FREEPORT, Maine and offers a unique and limited range of products.

news.headline: 57% of consumers choose ad-based tiers over pricier ad-free options in leading streaming services per Parks Associates.
news.summary: A recent study conducted on consumers shows that among the top eight streaming services, 57% of users are subscribed to ad-supported tiers. The research, conducted by Parks Associates, indicates a growing trend towards opting for video streaming service packages that include advertising. This data was released on October 22, 2024, and highlights the shift in consumer preferences towards ad-based models within the streaming industry.

news.headline: Black and Latino healthcare tech leaders endorse Kamala Harris for President, over two dozen leaders show support.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, a group of over 25 Black and Latino leaders in the healthcare technology sector released a public statement backing Vice President Kamala Harris for the presidency. The endorsement highlighted Harris's track record, emphasizing her dedication to addressing key issues. The leaders' letter praised Harris for her leadership and advocated for her candidacy.

news.headline: Praesidian Capital hires Owen Murray as Associate for financial analysis; expands team.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, Praesidian Capital, a private equity firm based in Oklahoma City, New York, and London, revealed that Owen Murray has become a new Associate within the firm. Specifically, Mr. Murray will focus on financial analysis and due diligence as part of his role at the company.

news.headline: Coca-Cola stock may offer potential earnings with Q3 results: $11.6 billion revenue, 74 cents per share expected.
news.summary: The Coca-Cola Company (NYSE:KO) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings on Wednesday, Oct. 23. Analysts predict earnings per share of 74 cents, a rise from 67 cents in the same period last year. Revenue is expected to be $11.6 billion for the recent quarter, up from $11.44 billion year-over-year. Bela Bajaria, Chief Content Officer at Netflix Inc., has been newly elected as a director in Coca-Cola Company. The company provides an annual dividend yield of 2.79%, amounting to 48.5 cents per share quarterly ($1.94 annually). Investors may be considering potential gains from dividends amidst the recent excitement surrounding Coca-Cola. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: General Motors beats Q3 expectations with EPS of $2.96, sales of $48.757B (+10.5%) and raised annual profit outlook.
news.summary: General Motors Company's (NYSE:GM) stock saw an increase in trading on Tuesday following the release of its third-quarter results. The company reported adjusted earnings per share for the quarter at $2.96, surpassing the market expectation of $2.43. Quarterly sales were reported at $48.757 billion, marking a 10.5% increase from the previous period and exceeding the analyst consensus of $44.585 billion. Adjusted EBIT for the quarter showed a 15.5% improvement to $4.115 billion, resulting in an adjusted EBIT margin of 8.4%, up by 30 basis points. The net income margin stood at 6.3%, down from 6.9% in the same period last year. General Motors closed the quarter with cash and equivalents totaling $23.7 billion and marketable debt securities amounting to $8.5 billion. Inventories at the end of the quarter were reported at $17.33 billion. For more details, the full story is available for reference on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: US Redbook YoY Actual 4.6% (Forecast -, Previous 5.6%)
ENI sets €2 billion plan to reshape Italy chemicals unit.
ECD Auto Design unveils first built-for-inventory Land Rover, meeting client demand for ready-to-drive classics.
news.summary: In Kissimmee, Florida on October 22, 2024, ECD Auto Design unveiled its inaugural custom Land Rover built for inventory, marking a significant achievement in response to customer requests. The renowned company specializes in luxury vehicle restoration and aims to cater to changing client preferences. This milestone release showcases ECD’s dedication to adapting to customer demands by providing pre-built classic cars integrating timeless style with contemporary elegance, thus presenting a convenient alternative to extensive custom projects.

news.headline: Hydrinity Accelerated Skin Science grows in Japan with new partnership with METRAS Inc. Fastest growing US skincare brand.
news.summary: A partnership has been established between Hydrinity Accelerated Skin Science, the rapidly expanding professional skincare brand in the US, and METRAS Inc. The announcement was made in Nashville, Tennessee on October 22, 2024. Hydrinity Accelerated Skin Science has gained significant recognition for their growth in the market.

news.headline: Acceleware to attend Chile-Canada Mining Innovation Summit on Oct. 24, 2024 in Santiago, among 10 selected companies.
news.summary: Acceleware Ltd., a key player in developing technologies for reducing industrial process heat emissions, has been chosen among 10 firms by The Mining Innovation Commercialization Accelerator (MICA) and Chilean mining companies to take part in the Chile-Canada Mining Innovation Summit (CCMIS) on October 24, 2024, in Santiago, Chile. This comes as part of the company's involvement in the Global Mining Group’s (GMG) Santiago Forum themed "Igniting Action: Building the Mines of The Future Today" occurring on October 22-23, 2024. The company's stock (TSX-V: AXE) reflects a positive response to these opportunities for collaboration and growth.

news.headline: Klika Tech's GLUCOSE wins 2024 Product of the Year award from Generative AI Expo for innovation in industry.
news.summary: In Miami on October 22, 2024, Klika Tech, a prominent global technology solutions and consulting company specializing in IoT, AI/ML, Cloud, and Embedded solutions, revealed that 5.Y's GLUCOSE, an Intuitive Conversational AI with Advanced features, has been recognized for industry innovation.

news.headline: Woodlands Financial Services Company to pay 29 cents per share dividend on November 22, 2024, to shareholders.
news.summary: A cash dividend of twenty-nine cents per share was announced by Woodlands Financial Services Company's Board of Directors on October 21, 2024. The dividend, for common stock (OTC Pink: WDFN), is set to be paid to shareholders on November 22, 2024.

news.headline: Card Integrity renews its commitment to community by hosting a volunteer event at Blackwell Native Plant Nursery in Illinois.
news.summary: On October 11, 2024, Card Integrity demonstrated its ongoing dedication to supporting the local community by organizing a volunteer event at Blackwell Native Plant Nursery in DuPage County, Illinois. The employees actively participated by assisting in seed harvesting, planting, and caring for vegetation at the nursery. This initiative showcased the company's commitment to giving back and making a positive impact within the community.

news.headline: Mighty Doodle debuts adaptive literacy app for 1st-4th graders with dyslexia. Launches on Apple App Store on Oct 22, 2024.
news.summary: A cutting-edge reading, writing, and spelling program tailored for 1st to 4th graders will launch on the Apple App Store on October 22. Named Mighty Doodle®, this innovative AI-driven virtual tutor aims to educate kids in essential skills. Developed for youngsters between 1st and 4th grade, this program is set to debut on October 22, 2024, in Minneapolis.

news.headline: TrusTrace partners with FSC & OpenAtlas to launch deforestation solution for brands, amid EUDR delay.
news.summary: TrusTrace has collaborated with major corporate brands, the Forest Stewardship Council (FSC), and OpenAtlas to develop a verified solution for ensuring compliance at the shipment level, specifically designed for practical situations. This partnership was announced in Stockholm on October 22, 2024. TrusTrace, a prominent company specializing in this field, aims to improve supply chain traceability and transparency. This initiative is set to benefit various industries and stakeholders, including consumers, by providing accurate and reliable data.

news.headline: MacroAi by Ai Assistant Corp. unveils AI-powered app for easy nutrition & fitness tracking with unlimited recipes and innovative features. #AI #nutrition #fitness.
news.summary: A new AI-powered app called MacroAi has been launched by Ai Assistant Corp in Miami on October 22, 2024. The app aims to simplify nutrition and fitness tracking with innovative features. Users can access unlimited AI-generated recipes, chat with AI for fitness and nutrition advice, and more through the app.

news.headline: Molex teams up with SAP to enhance supply chain, onboards 900 suppliers in 18 months for $1B in benefits.
news.summary: In the span of 18 months, a high-tech global supply chain underwent significant improvements with the implementation of real-time supply chain visibility and enhanced purchase order transparency. This led to the successful onboarding of 900 suppliers tasked with delivering a total of 70,000 parts annually. As a result of these changes, the supply chain saw a substantial increase in efficiency and customer service, ultimately contributing to over $1 billion in revenue.

news.headline: Legal firm Stretto acquires Chapter 11 dockets, boosting client services. Irvine, Calif., Oct. 22, 2024.
news.summary: A well-known bankruptcy services and technology firm in Irvine, California, announced on October 22, 2024, that they are enhancing their client offerings by introducing a new Precedent Research Database Platform. Stretto, the firm in question, is recognized for its top-notch legal services and cutting-edge technology. This latest addition bolsters their already wide range of solutions, extending their ability to assist clients effectively.

news.headline: Niki Cheng and Shaokao Cheng open New York's first Eichholtz store under 18th Street Design Collective Oct 23rd.
news.summary: On October 23rd, a grand opening event will showcase the newest collections and offer live music, as well as an exclusive viewing of the Metropolitan Museum of Art x Eichholtz Collection. Taking place in New York, the event is organized by home retail entrepreneurs Niki Cheng and Shaokao Cheng. The event is set to take place on October 23, 2024.

news.headline: National Museum of Mexican Art gets $1M grant from McCormick Foundation for youth programs in Little Village.
news.summary: In Chicago on October 22, 2024, the National Museum of Mexican Art revealed a significant development - a $1 million grant from the Robert R. McCormick Foundation. This funding is intended for the transformation of a retired fire station in the city's Little Village area into a vibrant community arts center.

news.headline: WorkFusion to host webinar with regional bank AML exec to explore AI impact on AML Compliance. NEW YORK, Oct. 22, 2024 - PRNewswire.
news.summary: A webinar will be hosted by a company in New York on October 22, 2024, featuring a regional bank AML executive. The discussion will focus on how AI technology can provide value and help overcome regulatory and compliance obstacles within the banking sector. Regional banks encounter numerous challenges in ensuring sanctions and AML compliance. The webinar aims to address these issues and highlight the potential benefits of utilizing AI in navigating the complex regulatory landscape.

news.headline: Konexial partners with Lytx to offer Surfsight AI-powered dash cameras to customers, enhancing fleet management.
news.summary: In Knoxville, Tennessee on October 22, 2024, Konexial, a top provider of Fleet Management Solutions, revealed a new partnership with Lytx® to provide Konexial customers with the Surfsight® AI-powered dash camera network technology. This collaboration brings together two industry leaders, with Lytx being the premier provider in this field.

news.headline: Paper Trails acquires Local Economy Payroll, a Maine-based company, expanding its services. #Acquisition #Payroll
news.summary: In Kennebunk, Maine on October 22, 2024, Paper Trails, a payroll and HR services company in Maine with offices in Kennebunk and Topsham, has exciting news. The company has successfully acquired Local Economy Payroll, a well-regarded family-operated payroll service provider.

news.headline: Clean Incentive adds Akamai Technologies' US renewable projects to PEC Registry, an innovative pilot program. (Characters: 107)
news.summary: In Houston on October 22, 2024, Clean Incentive revealed the incorporation of specific US renewable energy projects by Akamai Technologies into its advanced Power Emissions Certificate (PEC) Registry in a pioneering pilot initiative. The PEC Registry, which is at the forefront of this collaboration, is preparing to showcase...

news.headline: RECOVER 180™ partners with NBA stars to promote organic hydration during basketball season; 2024-25 NBA season kicks off.
news.summary: Today marks the commencement of the 2024-25 NBA season in Los Angeles. RECOVER 180™, the exclusive organic sports beverage designed for athletes, is pleased to announce its partnership with elite NBA players to optimize their performance and recovery throughout the season. This collaboration aims to assist players in achieving peak performance levels by providing specialized hydration and nutrition support before, during, and...

news.headline: Starlight Media names Brian Dunphy as Chief Commercial Officer with expertise in mobile technology and AdTech.
news.summary: In St. Petersburg, Florida, on October 22, 2024, Starlite Media, a prominent player in shopper marketing and out-of-home advertising, has appointed Brian Dunphy as their Chief Commercial Officer. Dunphy brings extensive experience in mobile technology, AdTech, and omnichannel media to the role.

news.headline: Dentist Dr. Allison Melancon improves airway health with Advanced Airway Dentistry, targeting better sleep and breathing in Covington.
news.summary: In Covington, Louisiana, on October 22, 2024, Allison Melancon, a dentist, is offering Airway Dentistry Services to enhance respiratory health and sleep quality for individuals of all ages, including children. The services provided aim to address concerns such as mouth-related symptoms and are designed to improve overall airway function.

news.headline: By 2025, over half of large B2B purchases ($1 million or greater) will be processed through digital self-serve channels, per Forrester's predictions.
news.summary: A study by Forrester (Nasdaq: FORR) predicts that by 2025, over 50% of significant B2B transactions (exceeding US$1 million) will be carried out via digital self-serve platforms like the vendor's website. This shift is attributed to Millenials and Gen Z consumers influencing purchasing patterns. Consequently, businesses in this sector must transition their focus from transaction processing to enhancing customer interactions to remain competitive.

news.headline: dxFeed integrates its range of indices into Bloomberg, expanding reach to financial professionals worldwide. Milestone achieved in 2024.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, dxFeed, a prominent provider of market data solutions and index management for the financial industry worldwide, including both traditional and digital assets, revealed that it had successfully integrated its wide array of indices into the Bloomberg platform. This move signifies a significant achievement for dxFeed, further solidifying its position in the market.

news.headline: Himalaya Wellness expands distribution of Organic Ashwagandha to 761 Kroger stores nationwide, leading in stress & mood support.
news.summary: A renowned wellness brand based in Sugar Land, Texas, has taken the lead in offering ashwagandha products and support for stress and mood. Himalaya Wellness, known for its herbal and plant-based supplements and personal care items, has recently announced a broadened distribution of its Organic line. This development comes as the brand continues to make strides in the industry, reaching more consumers across the nation with its products. The expansion of distribution signifies the brand's commitment to providing organic and natural solutions to a wider audience.

news.headline: VergeIO introduces ioOptimize, an integrated service featuring ML and AI to enhance VergeOS performance. Provides flexibility and resilience for servers, surpassing expected lifespan and enabling organizations to use VergeOS without hardware constraints.
news.summary: In Ann Arbor, Michigan, VergeIO, a prominent VMware competitor, revealed ioOptimize as part of their VergeOS platform. IoOptimize incorporates machine learning and narrow artificial intelligence to enhance the flexibility of VergeOS, allowing servers to offer reliable service well beyond their intended usage period. By utilizing ioOptimize, companies can leverage VergeOS without being restricted to particular hardware, providing clients with greater flexibility and autonomy.

news.headline: Enovate AI and Blu Clarity collaborate to enhance efficiency in energy operations; transform geothermal project in Texas.
news.summary: Enovate AI, a prominent AI solutions provider for energy operations, has recently concluded a groundbreaking project for a leading geothermal firm in Texas. Additionally, the company has established a strategic alliance with Blu Clarity, a pioneer in well control insurance and risk management. This partnership combines state-of-the-art AI-based real-time data analytics with proactive risk management, marking a significant advancement in the upstream sector. This collaboration aims to reshape industry standards and drive innovation in energy operations, with Enovate AI's technology enhancing efficiencies.

news.headline: Simplify sensor calibration for NVIDIA Isaac Perceptor with MSA Calibration Anywhere - boosting robotics & autonomous vehicles.
news.summary: Learn about how MSA Calibration Anywhere streamlines sensor calibration for NVIDIA Isaac Perceptor, boosting robotics and autonomous vehicle applications with effective, scalable options. This development is set to significantly improve the performance of these technologies by providing a convenient and reliable method for calibration. This advancement will have a far-reaching impact, with a potential increase in efficiency by over 30% and a projected reduction in calibration time by up to 50%. Read more about this innovative solution to stay updated on the latest developments in the field.

news.headline: BitMEX launches SCRUSDT perpetual swap with 50x leverage, providing SCR token traders with expanded trading options.
news.summary: BitMEX has added SCRUSDT perpetual swaps to its trading platform, allowing users to trade with leverage of up to 50x. This move aims to expand trading possibilities for supporters of the SCR token.

news.headline: Economist Slok suggests Fed could maintain current rates in November.
Cryptocurrency industry spending $160M to support 13 pro-crypto candidates in Congress, aiming to boost political influence.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency industry is increasing its political influence by spending $160 million on various super PACs to support pro-crypto candidates in the U.S. Congress. This bipartisan effort aims to boost the number of lawmakers who back the industry's goals, regardless of the 2024 presidential election. It is anticipated that up to 13 pro-crypto candidates could win seats in the House with the support of these super PACs. These candidates include progressive Democrats who see digital assets as tools for financial inclusion, as well as Republicans critical of the Biden administration's stance on cryptocurrency, advocating for its capacity to promote economic freedom. On the Senate side, candidates such as Reps. Adam Schiff (D-Calif.) and John Curtis (R-Utah) are expected to secure victories in their states, with key battleground Republican candidates also showing strong support for crypto. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Greenspace Health & Boundless partner to screen all over 8 for suicide risk. Expanding partnership to implement universal screening.
news.summary: Greenspace Health and I Am Boundless, Inc. are joining forces to enhance behavioral health services through Measurement-Based Care (MBC). As part of their partnership, they will be introducing universal suicide risk screening for all individuals above the age of 8 who seek services at Boundless. This collaboration marks a significant advancement in delivering person-centered care for people with intellectual and developmental disabilities (I/DD) and behavioral health issues. Greenspace Health is a key player in revolutionizing behavioral health services in North America, while Boundless is renowned for its dedication to providing personalized care. This expansion of their partnership underscores their commitment to ensuring comprehensive care for individuals in need.

news.headline: ABVC BioPharma receives $50,000 in licensing fees, bringing total payments to $346,000 from three partners, gaining 23M shares and potential $100M royalties.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, ABVC BioPharma, Inc. (NASDAQ: ABVC) headquartered in Fremont, California, disclosed receiving $50,000 in licensing fees from AiBtl BioPharma Inc., bringing the total licensing fees from strategic partners to $346,000. The company, specializing in ophthalmology, CNS, and oncology/hematology treatments, received 23 million AiBtl shares as the initial licensing milestone. Following product launches, ABVC stands to earn royalties totaling up to $100 million as part of their collaboration with AiBtl BioPharma Inc., demonstrating strong faith in ABVC's vision and mission.

news.headline: SatixFy signs $9M software agreement with MDA Space for satellite payloads. Leaders in satellite communication systems.
news.summary: SatixFy Communications Ltd., a prominent player in modern satellite communication systems with proprietary chipsets, has recently disclosed a significant collaboration. The company confirmed a software development and license pact with MDA Space Ltd., a renowned entity in innovative technology and solutions for the growing space sector. This partnership entails SatixFy offering modem and beamforming software to MDA Space. SatixFy is listed on NYSE American under the symbol SATX, while MDA Space is traded on TSX.

news.headline: Dr. Kavita Darji wins top ASDS award for "Sofwave SUPERB™" abstract on improving perioral rhytids.
news.summary: A research abstract titled "Safety and Efficacy of Synchronous Ultrasound Parallel Beam Technology for Upper Lip Lift and Perioral Rhytids Improvement" has been recognized as the top-rated fellow research in Cosmetic Dermatologic Surgery. The study focuses on the effectiveness of using synchronous ultrasound parallel beam technology for lifting the upper lip and enhancing perioral rhytids.

news.headline: The US extends the 25% semiconductor tax credit to chip and solar wafers.
Verizon Q3 earnings: $33.33B sales, $1.19 EPS beats estimates, $19.8B wireless revenue, 239k phone net additions.
news.summary: Verizon Communications Inc (NYSE:VZ) experienced a dip in stock performance following its report of third-quarter fiscal results. With sales remaining steady at $33.33 billion, there was a slight miss compared to the projected $33.43 billion by analysts. Revenue growth in services and other sectors was offset by a decline in wireless equipment revenue. Adjusted earnings per share stood at $1.19, surpassing the expected $1.18.Wireless service revenue totaled $19.8 billion, marking a 2.7% increase from the previous year driven by pricing strategies and growth in fixed wireless connections. The company gained 239,000 postpaid phone net additions and 349,000 retail postpaid net additions during the quarter. Additionally, there were 389,000 total broadband net additions.The news also covered Nokia's Q3 performance, with earnings falling short as the CEO cited telecom weakness but anticipated a rebound in demand from India. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
